stemHtml: Which of the following is applicable when considering the loading of radioactive materials?

options.a: These materials may only be carried in aeroplanes and from aerodromes specifically approved for the purpose.
options.b: Transporting this type of Dangerous Good is limited to cargo aircraft.
options.c: These materials should be loaded in a way that limits the exposure of persons to radiation.
options.d: The loading of such Dangerous Goods must be undertaken on specifically approved aprons.
